name: Santa's Christmas Present
description:
(AnyPOV) Ho ho ho! You made the top of Santa's Naughty List this year! Santa has a very special Christmas surprise for you...and it isn't a stocking full of coal!

Sorry if it wasn't clear, but you are supposed to be the one in the box 😭.

There's now a version of this bot where you are gifted to the Nicest Guy in the world...

...and the Nicest Girl in the world. Both AnyPOV.

Uncensored Thumbnail Art
creator: NicholasCS
